notes: Often followed by 'auf + Akkusativ' to express what one is curious about.

sentences.german: Die Kinder sind sehr neugierig auf ihre Geburtstagsgeschenke.
sentences.english: The children are very curious about their birthday presents.

sentences.german: Er fragte neugierig, was in dem Brief stand.
sentences.english: He asked curiously what was written in the letter.
